In 2026, the answer could not be clearer: no one has a clue.Consider Highguard, 2026’s first big flop. title: The Rite of Spring / Mirror review – techie Stravinsky and digital doppelgangers from Alexander Whitley
summary: Sadler’s Wells East, LondonVisual spectacle overwhelms the human drama in the choreographer’s tech-heavy double billTechnology can sometimes seem to take on its own life and sideline the people it is nominally assisting.
